tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Cowboy take me away
this is in standard, unless you wanna put all the strings down a halfstep, sounds great either way!


[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] 
I said I wanna touch the earth [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna break it in my hands[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I wanna grow something wild and unruly[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna sleep on the hard ground[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
In the comfort of your arms[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
On a pillow of bluebonnets[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
In a blanket made of stars[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Oh it sounds good to me I said[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 
Cowboy take me away[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Fly this girl as high as you can[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Into the wild blue[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Set me free oh I pray[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch] 
Closer to heaven above and[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Closer to you  closer to you[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna walk and not run[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna skip and not fall[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna look at the horizon [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
And not see a building standing tall[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna be the only one[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
For miles and miles[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Except for maybe you [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
And your simple smile[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Oh it sounds good to me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Oh it sounds so good to me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 
Cowboy take me away[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Fly this girl as high as you can[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Into the wild blue[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Set me free oh I pray[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch] 
Closer to heaven above and[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Closer to you closer to you[/tab]


[SOLO]
